As Staten Island braces for another storm reminiscent of the Blizzard of 2016, NYC faces a surge in crime, environmental lawsuits, and ongoing housing challenges, while local lawmakers push for rent control to support small businesses amidst rising tensions in various neighborhoods.

### Risks & Alerts

- Another snowstorm may hit NYC this weekend; residents should prepare for potential disruptions. - As another monster storm looms for Staten Island, residents should brace for severe weather conditions. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
